title: Mr. Pen- Spring Clamps, 4 Pack, 6 Inches, Heavy Duty, Metal, Spring Clips
features: Mr. Pen spring clamps come in a pack of 4, designed to last with a sturdy metal construction, ensuring a firm and secure hold for a variety of projects.
With a maximum opening of 2.2 inches, these clamps are perfect for photography, woodworking, art and craft, and any other activities that require a strong grip.
The clamps are equipped with ergonomic, soft PVC-coated handles that provide a comfortable and non-slip grip to reduce hand fatigue during extended use.
Each clamp features rubber jaw pads to provide secure clamping without damaging the surfaces of the materials you are working with.
This set of 4 clamps is ideal for both professional tradespeople and DIY enthusiasts, providing enough clamps for multiple projects at once.
